name: Monterey Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the crusts from the bread.
2. Spread the bread with softened butter, then cut into halves.
3. Arrange half of the bread slices in a greased shallow 3-quart baking dish.
4. Cover with half of the corn.
5. Seed and cut the chiles into strips; arrange half of the chile strips over the corn.
6. Sprinkle with half of the cheese.
7. Repeat the layers.
8. Combine the eggs, milk, and salt in a bowl.
9. Pour the mixture over the ingredients in the casserole dish.
10. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or longer.
11. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until puffy and brown.
